center.name: 加拿大西部
center.summary: 加拿大西部是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括宽尾煌蜂鸟、American goshawk，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In North America, they are most broadly found in the Western United States, including Alaska, and western Canada

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: platycercus }} The broad-tailed hummingbird (Selasphorus platycercus) is a medium-sized hummingbird species found in highland regions from western United States and Western Canada to Mexico and Guatemala.{{Cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sklz7tAUa4IC&q=427|title=A Guide to the Birds of Mexico and Northern Central America, page 427|last1=Howell|first1=Steve N
